---
title: "Index"
---

<!-- DO NOT EDIT. Generated by scripts/build-book.R from the Markdown
     in case-studies/. Edit the source case files and re-run the build. -->


Find cases by what they are about and by the kind of reasoning error they
expose.

## By topic

**AI governance** — [03](cases/case-03.qmd)

**Aggregation** — [02](cases/case-02.qmd)

**Algorithmic fairness** — [04](cases/case-04.qmd)

**Data visualization** — [01](cases/case-01.qmd)

**Epidemiology** — [05](cases/case-05.qmd)

**Hospital quality** — [02](cases/case-02.qmd)

**Human performance** — [12](cases/case-12.qmd)

**Machine learning** — [03](cases/case-03.qmd), [04](cases/case-04.qmd)

**Nutrition** — [05](cases/case-05.qmd)

**Probability** — [12](cases/case-12.qmd)

**Public health** — [01](cases/case-01.qmd), [02](cases/case-02.qmd), [05](cases/case-05.qmd)

**Public safety** — [03](cases/case-03.qmd)

**Surveillance** — [04](cases/case-04.qmd)

**Survival analysis** — [01](cases/case-01.qmd)

**Talent** — [12](cases/case-12.qmd)


## By fallacy

**Accuracy paradox** — [03](cases/case-03.qmd)

**Base rate neglect** — [03](cases/case-03.qmd), [04](cases/case-04.qmd)

**Conditional probability** — [12](cases/case-12.qmd)

**Confounding** — [02](cases/case-02.qmd), [05](cases/case-05.qmd)

**Confusion of the inverse** — [12](cases/case-12.qmd)

**False positive paradox** — [04](cases/case-04.qmd)

**Reference group bias** — [05](cases/case-05.qmd)

**Right censoring** — [01](cases/case-01.qmd)

**Simpson's paradox** — [02](cases/case-02.qmd)

**Survivorship bias** — [01](cases/case-01.qmd)


## By difficulty

**Medium** — [01](cases/case-01.qmd), [03](cases/case-03.qmd), [05](cases/case-05.qmd)

**Hard** — [02](cases/case-02.qmd), [04](cases/case-04.qmd), [12](cases/case-12.qmd)
